title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Console Repair Bay
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a collection-processing and streaming pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Choose mutating or copying array operations and document ownership before updating shared data.
Use map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, flat, and flatMap from the required output and early-exit behavior.
Sort with a valid comparator, copying policy, stability expectations, and locale-aware text rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
